text.title: Competitive Positioning (PM) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `competitive-positioning`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: alternatives array with fewer than 3 entries (must include 'do nothing')
